name: Wilson Ceramics Community Pottery Class
summary: Weekly community pottery class at Wilson Ceramics, 6:00 to 8:00 PM ET. Wheel-throwing and handbuilding for all levels; part of the 6-week session ($120). Studio prep from 5:30 PM.

name: Robert Wilson's birthday
summary: Robert Wilson's birthday (deceased 2018). James and Patricia mark it with a phone call in the morning.

name: James's birthday
summary: James's birthday. Low-key by preference. Dinner with Vera, call with Joel, no studio classes that evening.

name: Vera Simmons's birthday
summary: Vera Simmons's birthday. Dinner out, gift early in the week.

name: Annual physical with Dr. Hart at CAMC Primary Care
summary: Annual physical with Dr. Hart at CAMC Primary Care.

name: Patricia Wilson's birthday
summary: Patricia Wilson's birthday. Drive to Huntington for a low-key family lunch.

name: Joel Wilson's birthday
summary: Joel Wilson's birthday. Call him; card mailed in time.

name: Fall Semester Ceramics Section Begins - University of Charleston
summary: (Monday) Fall semester adjunct ceramics section begins at the University of Charleston. First class 4:00 PM ET, ENG-225 ceramics studio.

name: Tamarack Marketplace Fall Artisan Showcase - Beckley, WV
summary: (Saturday) Tamarack Marketplace fall artisan showcase, Beckley, WV. Wilson Ceramics booth 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM ET. Vera helping with setup; load-in 8:30 AM.

name: Charleston Public Library Workshop: Selling Handmade Online
summary: (Friday) Charleston Public Library small-business workshop, "Selling Handmade Online", James co-presenting 6:00 to 8:00 PM ET.

name: Wilson Ceramics fall community class session ends
summary: (Saturday) Wilson Ceramics fall community class session ends. New winter session registration opens via Typeform.

name: James turns 42
summary: (Saturday) James turns 42. Low-key dinner with Vera at Pies and Pints, evening call with Joel.

name: Thanksgiving in Huntington with Patricia and Joel
summary: (Thursday) Thanksgiving in Huntington with Patricia and Joel. Drive up Wednesday afternoon, return Friday morning.

name: Capitol Market Holiday Craft Fair - Charleston
summary: (Saturday) Capitol Market holiday craft fair, Charleston. All-day booth 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM ET, Wilson Ceramics seasonal stoneware lineup. Nadia covering studio walk-in inquiries.

name: Dental Cleaning with Dr. Chen
summary: (Friday) Dental cleaning with Dr. Chen, 9:00 AM ET.

name: Fall Semester Critiques Wrap - University of Charleston
summary: (Friday) Fall semester critiques wrap at the University of Charleston. Grade entry due in Google Classroom by 5:00 PM ET.

name: GI Follow-up with Dr. Stokes - CAMC
summary: (Thursday) Dr. Stokes GI follow-up, 11:00 AM ET at CAMC GI.

name: Annual Physical with Dr. Hart - CAMC Primary Care
summary: (Thursday) Annual physical with Dr. Hart at CAMC Primary Care, 10:00 AM ET.
